炒麵王, a chef's dream come true, absolutely stunning, pack with flavour, rich, and the texture is extraordinary

Now, the secret behind of making ~THE~ best~ 炒麵王 is to have nice boiling water

- 炒麵王
- Salt
- Pepper
- Olive oil

Now, add the boiling water, and in she goes, stir a little bit, and ~WAIT~ for few minutes

- Reduce
- Drain
- Sauce

Now, remember, no colour no flavour, put some colour on it

- Mix

The sauce has done its magic, the noodle is cooked ~JUST~ right

- 炒麵王, DONE!

Fucking delicious!

Don't carve the noodle yet.

Let it rest for at least 10 mins. This gives time for the noodle to redistribute all the water. The more it rest, the more delicious it is.

Put in some lemon zest and half lemon juice. This gives a fresh, vagrant flavour and acidity to the noodle. That citrusy, zesty flavour

佢識 不過一煮東亞野就基本上俾鍵盤俠屌
但佢啲功架係喺度
Jamie Oliver就乜撚野都落lime/ lemon juice
佢有次拍片教煎牛排我真係屌咗出聲

不過睇ramsay同佢仔女一齊煮野食嗰啲片先係最開心，尤其是對住兩個女，佢完全係零反抗能力
睇完hell's kitchen / master chef再睇佢同仔女煮野食嗰種反差好撚搞笑
